findings.title: Kubelet read-only port open
findings.message: kubelet read-only port 10255 is open

findings.title: Managed identity reachable
findings.message: ServiceAccount is bound to a cloud managed identity; ensure metadata API egress is restricted and the identity is least-privilege

findings.title: Wildcard resources in role
findings.message: role grants wildcard resources (resources: ['*'])

findings.title: ServiceAccount fan-out
findings.message: ServiceAccount 'shared-sa' is reused by 3 workloads across 2 namespaces (production, staging) — wide lateral-movement blast radius

findings.title: Sensitive hostPath mount
findings.message: mounts sensitive hostPath '/' — full/host-critical filesystem access

findings.title: Image not signed
findings.message: image 'nginx:latest' has no cosign/notary signature annotation

findings.title: Docker socket mounted
findings.message: mounts the Docker socket (/var/run/docker.sock) — container escape

findings.title: cluster-admin on default SA
findings.message: cluster-admin bound to default ServiceAccount (kube-system/default)

findings.title: Deprecated/EOL Kubernetes version
findings.message: cluster runs an EOL/CVE-affected version (v1.24.0)

findings.title: Mounted cloud credentials
findings.message: mounts a cloud credential path (/root/.aws/credentials) — service principal / managed identity exposure

findings.title: Wildcard verbs in role
findings.message: role grants wildcard verbs (verbs: ['*'])

findings.title: Writable hostPath mount
findings.message: mounts a writable hostPath '/var/run/docker.sock' (persistence / lateral movement vector)

findings.title: API audit logging disabled
findings.message: API server has no --audit-log-path (audit logging off)
